# RateRadar: Fed Rate Tracker

> RateRadar is a free iPhone app and web app that tracks the U.S. federal funds rate and the market-implied probability of every upcoming Federal Reserve (FOMC) and European Central Bank (ECB) interest-rate decision, with 60 days of history showing how the odds moved into each meeting.

RateRadar computes its own probabilities in-house from 30-Day Fed Funds Futures and €STR OIS quotes, using the public CME step-function methodology. It never scrapes CME FedWatch or ECB Watch. Not financial advice.

## Key facts
- Platform: iPhone (iOS); also a free web app. No Android version yet.
- Price: Free (no in-app purchases or subscriptions at this time).
- Category: Finance.
- Coverage: U.S. Federal Reserve (FOMC) and European Central Bank (ECB).
- Data: computed in-house from Fed Funds Futures and €STR OIS; never scraped.
- Differentiator: 60 days of historical probability charts per meeting, plus meeting reminders and sharp-move alerts.

## App
- [RateRadar on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/rateradar-fed-rate-tracker/id6768628917): Free iPhone app for Fed + ECB rate-decision probabilities with historical tracking.

## Website
- [Dashboard](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/): Live Fed + ECB probabilities and the most-likely rate path.
- [Fed](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/fed): Next FOMC meeting, with odds of a hold, cut, or hike.
- [ECB](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/ecb): Next ECB decision and its implied rate path.
- [Fed vs ECB](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/compare): Side-by-side divergence view.
- [Methodology](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/methodology): How the probabilities are computed.
- [Glossary](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/glossary): Plain-English rate terms (FOMC, basis points, and more).

## Pricing
- [Pricing details](https://rateradar-web.vercel.app/pricing.md): RateRadar is free to download and use.

Last updated: 2026-07-23
